prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约512名、658名、1043名、1518名、1688名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1176名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准位次约1688名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为19人，2023–2024年增至20人，2025年扩至22人；2026年计划缩减至19人，较2025年减少3人（缩招约13.6%），缩招通常使录取位次数字减小（竞争相对缓和），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第5名，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及校内管理事件），但2025年周期评价偏正面（科研成果荣誉）；抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），社会关注度极高；历史投档异常方面，2022年河南曾出现投档线波动（中关注），但整体未出现严重断档信号，医学类专业报考热度持续坚挺；复旦大学（含医学院）拥有临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、基础医学A-、药学A、护理学A-、生物学A+等一批A类学科，医学学科群实力位居全国前列，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续偏高，医学大类整体报考意愿旺盛；河北省2026年高考总报名约609800人，按近年物理类占比约59.8%估算，物理类考生约364660人，较2025年物理类363040人略有增加（+0.45%），竞争小幅加剧；省控线方面，河北省物理类本科批2024年448分、2025年459分，呈上升趋势，反映整体竞争强度提升；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，对河北省考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在河北省招生计划占比较小（2025年22人），属于典型的外省顶尖院校少量招生模式，位次对计划变化较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩减（缩招约13.6%）、本省物理类考生小幅增加、医学专业持续高热及学校顶尖层次等因素，但考生规模扩大、专业热度高、省控线上移等竞争加剧因素部分抵消该效应。经有限修正后，预测2026年最低录取位次约1570名，较2025年1688名略前移（位次数字减小约118名），区间为1382–1758名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）
- 临床医学（卓越临床医师班）（5年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班）
- 药学（拔尖班）（融通项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（含药学产教融合班）
- 基础医学
- 预防医学（拔尖班）（融通项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1570名，区间1382–1758名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主攻方向（口腔医学、药学拔尖班），一档专业（临床医学八年制、五年制卓越班）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（基础医学、预防医学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<1382名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category in Hebei Province were approximately 512, 658, 1043, 1518, and 1688, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1176 places over the past 4 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1688; the enrollment plan for this university in the Physics Category in Hebei Province was 19 students in 2021–2022, increased to 20 students in 2023–2024, and expanded to 22 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 19 students, a decrease of 3 students (about 13.6% reduction) compared to 2025, which typically makes the admission ranking number smaller (relatively less competition), but other factors need to be considered comprehensively.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 5th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (mainly involving internal management incidents), but the evaluation for the 2025 cycle is positive (scientific research achievements and honors); it ranks 4th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with extremely high social attention; in terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a fluctuation in the admission cutoff line in Henan in 2022 (medium attention), but overall there is no signal of serious gaps, and the popularity of medical majors remains strong; Fudan University (including the Medical College) has a number of A-class disciplines such as Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Basic Medicine A-, Pharmacy A, Nursing A-, and Biology A+, with the medical discipline group ranking among the top in the country, providing sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to have high social popularity, with strong overall willingness to apply for medical categories; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Hebei Province is about 609,800, and based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 59.8%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 364,660, a slight increase (+0.45%) compared to 363,040 in 2025, leading to a small intensification of competition; regarding the provincial control line, the undergraduate batch for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 448 points in 2024 and 459 points in 2025, showing an upward trend, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province is relatively small (22 students in 2025), typical of a top-tier university from other provinces with a small enrollment model, making the ranking sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (about 13.6% reduction), a slight increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the top-tier level of the university, but factors such as the expansion of the candidate pool, high major popularity, and upward movement of the provincial control line partially offset this effect. After limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1570, slightly forward (ranking number decreases by about 118) compared to 1688 in 2025, with a range of 1382–1758.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program, Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Excellent Clinical Physician Class) (5-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (Including Excellent Stomatologist Class)
- Pharmacy (Top-Notch Class) (Integration Project).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Including Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Basic Medicine
- Preventive Medicine (Top-Notch Class) (Integration Project).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1570, range 1382–1758. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Stomatology, Pharmacy Top-Notch Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Five-Year Excellent Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Basic Medicine, Preventive Medicine) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1382), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
